# GitHub repository settings (SEO)

Set these on the repo **About** panel at [github.com/kingbeto/zebralabelprint](https://github.com/kingbeto/zebralabelprint) so search and GitHub Explore surface the project.

## Description (max ~350 characters)

```
Free macOS app to print ZPL label files to Zebra thermal printers (ZD410, ZD620, etc.) via CUPS. Preview labels, fix alignment, Apple silicon.
```

## Topics

Add as many as GitHub allows:

`zebra` `zpl` `macos` `label-printing` `thermal-printer` `zebra-printer` `cups` `zpl-printing` `barcode-labels` `shipping-labels` `apple-silicon` `zd410` `label-preview` `open-source` `swiftui`

## Website

Optional: link to the latest release page:

```
https://github.com/kingbeto/zebralabelprint/releases/latest
```

## CLI (if you use GitHub CLI)

```bash
gh repo edit kingbeto/zebralabelprint \
  --description "Free macOS app to print ZPL label files to Zebra thermal printers via CUPS. Preview, alignment, Apple silicon." \
  --homepage "https://github.com/kingbeto/zebralabelprint/releases/latest"

gh repo edit kingbeto/zebralabelprint --add-topic zebra --add-topic zpl --add-topic macos \
  --add-topic label-printing --add-topic thermal-printer --add-topic zebra-printer --add-topic cups \
  --add-topic zpl-printing --add-topic apple-silicon --add-topic zd410 --add-topic open-source
```
